ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Current job title of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name and phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Current department ID of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position or job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department ID where the position belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Primary responsibilities of the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Skills required for the position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position or job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended in the position (or NULL if current) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in position */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating during the period */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, department manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
